name: AI Free Tier Change History
description: Append-only record of every change to the AI Free Tier Ledger: structured before/after values with dates. Wording edits appear alongside real limit changes.

changes.note: Cut happened earlier in 2026; recorded when verified.

changes.old: One-time $5 welcome credit for new accounts (discontinued mid-2025)
changes.new: Daily free-token allowance with API data-sharing opt-in: up to ~1M tokens/day on frontier models, ~10M/day on mini models
changes.note: Recorded when verified; the data-sharing program replaced the welcome credit.

changes.old: Free Imagen-family generation with a Google account
changes.note: Shut down April 2026, folded into Google Flow.

changes.new: Imagen image generation and limited Veo video with a Google account, monthly credit allowance

changes.note: Pricing overhauled March 2026: credits replaced by daily/weekly quotas.

changes.new: Compute-based caps refreshing every 5 h with a weekly ceiling; 5 Deep Research uses/month
changes.note: Google switched the free app plan from message counts to compute-based limits.

changes.new: Limits are dynamic; opting out of personalized ads can cut the free cap to as low as ~5 msgs / 3 h
